name: Smokey Salmon Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and break fish into flakes. Set aside.
2. Mix together the mashed and grated potato in a bowl.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a frying pan and fry bacon until crisp.
4. Add the cooked bacon to the potato mixture along with the salmon, mixing well to break up the salmon.
5. Divide the mixture into 10 or 12 portions and shape each portion into a burger using hands or a burger maker.
6. Fry the burgers gently for 5 minutes on each side, or until well browned. Cook 3 or 4 burgers at a time to avoid overcrowding the pan.
7. Keep cooked burgers warm while preparing the rest. Serve in split rolls garnished with salad and relishes.
8. Makes 10-12 servings. Approx. 380 calories per serving.
